word: G1634 - ἐκψύχω - ekpsýchō - ek-psoo'-kho - Give up the ghost

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκψύχω

- Transliteration: Ekpsucho

- Phonetic: ek-psoo'-kho

- Definition:

1. to expire, to breathe out one's life

- Origin: from G1537 and G5594

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G5594; to expire: - give (yield) up the ghost.
